news: [Community] First coding contribution in dozen years, thanks @juliusMansus. Project is now officially a multi members corporation
[Contribute?] Open your PR : many mysql and postgres clones to cover, or testing on docker using python and .NET endpoints, or any other topic
[DNS strategy] You're a security expert ? GUI, not CLI, then no. Though give a try to the new DNS strategy, you can test it locally without any domain
[RCE shell] How to trigger RCE or reverse shell with only one click ? For details go to https://github.com/ron190/jsql-injection/wiki/Exploit
[Pinned] Report any bugs and thoughts, add your star at https://github.com/ron190/jsql-injection
[Subtle music starts flowing to your ears, light and soft arrangements from classical composers rolling. Calm, at peace. Also free ad. No, you can't put car ads here]
